inputs.label: Club Speed
inputs.businessContext: Club head speed at impact, typically 70-130 mph for amateur golfers

businessContext_i18n.en: Club head speed at impact, typically 70-130 mph for amateur golfers
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma anında sopa başı hızı, amatör golfçüler için tipik olarak 70-130 mph

inputs.label: Smash Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ball speed divided by club speed, typically 1.35-1.5 for drivers

businessContext_i18n.en: Ball speed divided by club speed, typically 1.35-1.5 for drivers
businessContext_i18n.tr: Top hızının sopa hızına bölümü, sürücüler için tipik olarak 1.35-1.5

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Initial vertical angle of ball flight, optimal around 10-15 degrees

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial vertical angle of ball flight, optimal around 10-15 degrees
businessContext_i18n.tr: Top uçuşunun ilk dikey açısı, optimum 10-15 derece civarı

inputs.label: Spin Rate
inputs.businessContext: Backspin rate, typical driver spin 2000-3000 rpm

businessContext_i18n.en: Backspin rate, typical driver spin 2000-3000 rpm
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönüş hızı, tipik sürücü dönüşü 2000-3000 rpm

inputs.label: Wind Speed
inputs.businessContext: Positive for tailwind, negative for headwind

businessContext_i18n.en: Positive for tailwind, negative for headwind
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pozitif rüzgar arkadan, negatif rüzgar karşıdan

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level, higher altitude reduces air density

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level, higher altitude reduces air density
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinden yükseklik, daha yüksek irtifa hava yoğunluğunu azaltır

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
